ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in meters */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment used at the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather station was installed */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for maintenance of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the weather data was collected */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "rel_hum" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in km */,
  "press_kpa" REAL /* Pressure in kPa */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Fog, Freezing Drizzle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type (e.g., Fog, Freezing Drizzle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the weather type (e.g., Precipitation, Clouds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry that the reading belongs to */,
  "temp_c" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point_temp_c" REAL /* Dew point temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "heat_index_c" REAL /* Heat index in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry that the reading belongs to */,
  "rel_hum" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  "abs_hum" REAL /* Absolute humidity in g/m^3 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry that the reading belongs to */,
  "wind_speed_km_h" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry that the reading belongs to */,
  "visibility_km" REAL /* Visibility in km */,
  "visibility_m" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure reading */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather data entry that the reading belongs to */,
  "press_kpa" REAL /* Pressure in kPa */,
  "press_inhg" REAL /* Pressure in inches of mercury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_readings_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Research focus of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., lead, member, collaborator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data used for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast model used */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data used for forecasting */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was made */,
  "forecast_temp_c" REAL /* Forecasted temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "forecast_humidity" REAL /* Forecasted humidity as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id")
)
